home.headline: Planning Poker
home.intro: Estimate user stories with your team using Planning Poker — simultaneous reveal prevents anchoring bias. Works in offline single-device mode or as a shared session.
home.whyText: Planning Poker prevents anchoring bias — a cognitive phenomenon where hearing one estimate influences all others. By voting simultaneously and only revealing after everyone has committed, you get independent estimates that surface the true distribution of uncertainty.
home.fibText: Story points use the Fibonacci sequence (1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13...) because the gaps between numbers grow with size. This reflects the reality that larger stories have more uncertainty — the difference between 8 and 13 is bigger than between 1 and 2, just like the uncertainty is.

session.title: Session
session.noCurrentStory: Select or add a story to start estimating.
